zh.lifeSummary: 當Sophie von Thüringen Herzogin von Brabant於1224年3月20日出生在德國賀林根阿爾騰包格 藍德阿爾騰包格時，她的父親Ludwig IV von Thüringen23歲，母親Landgräfin Elisabeth von Ungarn die Heilige16歲。她於1241年與Hendrik II 'de Edelmoedige' van Brabant結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1275年5月29日在她的家鄉享年51歲，埋葬在比利時布拉班特 瓦隆維勒斯-拉-維爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sophie von Thüringen Herzogin von Brabant于1224年3月20日出生在德国賀林根阿爾騰包格 藍德阿爾騰包格时，她的父亲Ludwig IV von Thüringen23岁，母亲Landgräfin Elisabeth von Ungarn die Heilige16岁。她于1241年与Hendrik II 'de Edelmoedige' van Brabant结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1275年5月29日在她的家乡享年51岁，埋葬在比利时布拉班特 瓦隆維勒斯-拉-維爾。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Thüringen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German (Thüringer): habitational name for someone from Thuringia. The region is named from its former occupation by the T(h)uringii, an ancient Germanic tribe. Compare Deringer and Dieringer .

variants.name: Deringer
meanings: from a short form of an old personal name, a variant of Därr (see Darr ).
variant of Döringer, a habitational name for someone from Thuringia (see Doering ). Compare Derringer .

nameMeanings.name: Sophie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Sophia .  In the English-speaking world, where it is often taken as a pet form of that name, it has been popular since the 18th century, and has become particularly fashionable since the 1990s.

variants.name: Sophy
meanings: form of   Sophia .  In the English-speaking world, where it is often taken as a pet form of that name, it has been popular since the 18th century, and has become particularly fashionable since the 1990s.

en.lifeSummary: When Sophie von Thüringen Herzogin von Brabant was born on 20 March 1224, in Altenburg, Altenburger Land, Thuringia, Germany, her father, Ludwig IV von Thüringen, was 23 and her mother, Landgräfin Elisabeth von Ungarn die Heilige, was 16. She married Hendrik II 'de Edelmoedige' van Brabant in 1241. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 29 May 1275, in her hometown, at the age of 51, and was buried in Villers-la-Ville, Walloon Brabant, Belgium.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sophie von Thüringen Herzogin von Brabant est née le 20 mars 1224, à Altenburg, Altenburger Land, Thüringen, Allemagne, son père, Ludwig IV von Thüringen, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Landgräfin Elisabeth von Ungarn die Heilige, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé Hendrik II 'de Edelmoedige' van Brabant en 1241. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 29 mai 1275, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterrée à Villers-la-Ville, Brabant wallon, Belgique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sophie von Thüringen Herzogin von Brabant am 20. März 1224 in Altenburg, Altenburger Land, Thüringen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ludwig IV von Thüringen 23 und ihre Mutter Landgräfin Elisabeth von Ungarn die Heilige 16. Sie hat 1241 Hendrik II 'de Edelmoedige' van Brabant geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 29. Mai 1275 im Alter von 51 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Villers-la-Ville, Wallonisch Brabant, Belgien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sophie von Thüringen Herzogin von Brabant è nata il il 20 marzo 1224 nel Altenburg, Altenburger Land, Thüringen, Germania, sua padre, Ludwig IV von Thüringen, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Landgräfin Elisabeth von Ungarn die Heilige, aveva 16 anni. Lei sposato Hendrik II 'de Edelmoedige' van Brabant nel 1241. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 29 maggio 1275, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolta a Villers-la-Ville, Brabant wallon, Belgio.

ja.lifeSummary: Sophie von Thüringen Herzogin von Brabantが1224年3月20日にドイツスuリンジェンアルテンブルジャー ランドアルテンブルグで生まれた時，父Ludwig IV von Thüringenは23歳，母Landgräfin Elisabeth von Ungarn die Heiligeは16歳であった。1241年にHendrik II 'de Edelmoedige' van Brabantと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1275年5月29日に故郷で51歳で死去し，ベルギーブラバント ワロンヴィラース-ラ-ヴィルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sophie von Thüringen Herzogin von Brabant(이)가 1224년 3월 20일 독일 스u링 알텐버거 랜드 알텐버그에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ludwig IV von Thüringen(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Landgräfin Elisabeth von Ungarn die Heilige(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 1241년 Hendrik II 'de Edelmoedige' van Brabant(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1275년 5월 29일 그녀의 고향에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 벨기에 브라반트 월런 비레르스-라-빌에 묻혔다.

mn.20 March 1224–29 May 1275: 1224 оны Гуравдугаар сарын 20–1275 оны Тавдугаар сарын 29

pt.20 March 1224–29 May 1275: 20 de março de 1224–29 de maio de 1275
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sophie von Thüringen Herzogin von Brabant nasceu em 20 de março de 1224, em Altenburg, Altenburger Land, Thüringen, Alemanha, seu pai, Ludwig IV von Thüringen, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Landgräfin Elisabeth von Ungarn die Heilige, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com Hendrik II 'de Edelmoedige' van Brabant em 1241. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 29 de maio de 1275, em sua cidade natal, com 51 anos, e foi sepultada em Villers-la-Ville, Brabant wallon, Bélgica.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sophie von Thüringen Herzogin von Brabant родилась 20 марта 1224 г. в местности алтенбург, алтенбургир ланд, тuринген, Германия, её отцу по имени Ludwig IV von Thüringen было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Landgräfin Elisabeth von Ungarn die Heilige, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hendrik II 'de Edelmoedige' van Brabant в 1241 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 29 мая 1275 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 51 год и была похоронена в местности виллирс-ла-вилл, брабант валлон, Бельгия.

es.20 March 1224–29 May 1275: 20 de marzo de 1224–29 de mayo de 1275
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sophie von Thüringen Herzogin von Brabant nació el 20 de marzo de 1224, en Altenburg, Altenburger Land, Thüringen, Alemania, su papá, Ludwig IV von Thüringen, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Landgräfin Elisabeth von Ungarn die Heilige, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Hendrik II 'de Edelmoedige' van Brabant en 1241. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 29 de mayo de 1275, en su pueblo, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultada en Villers-la-Ville, Brabant wallon, Bélgica.
